## 30-second human summary

- **What changed:**
- **Research signal:** Unknown / Weak / Promising / Competitive / Breakthrough
- **Time/GPU/cost:**
- **What happens next:**
- **Harness health / external boundary:** None

## Evidence and validation

- [ ] Claims are linked to reproducible code/config/commit and the epistemic ledger is updated when strategy memory changes
- [ ] Evaluation, Mission, budget, or other constitutional boundaries were preserved or changed through an explicit recorded decision
- [ ] Counter-hypotheses, reversal evidence, uncertainty, and valid negative results were retained
- [ ] Lifecycle changes used explicit revision-checked transitions; active Campaign/Job writes used the current fenced claim
- [ ] Resource use was measured with typed resources
- [ ] A cancellation request was not reported as a confirmed stop without external termination evidence
- [ ] Paid compute, when used, had a reviewed code-registered control adapter with enforced cancellation and provider cost metering
- [ ] Context/Handoff files are bounded and do not contain raw secrets/log dumps
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `researchctl self-test`
